Name: KEY_GUIDE_PARAM
Description: Defines contextual key guide display rules, including spatial trigger volume, orientation constraints, and UI text for in-world interaction prompts.

Fields.Name: Text ID
Fields.Description: ID of the localized text displayed for the key guide prompt.

Fields.Name: X-Axis Half Extent / Radius
Fields.Description: Horizontal size of the interaction trigger area, either as half-width or radius depending on shape type.

Fields.Name: Y-Axis Half Extent
Fields.Description: Vertical size of the interaction trigger volume.

Fields.Name: Z-Axis Half Extent
Fields.Description: Forward/backward size of the interaction trigger volume.

Fields.Name: Z-Axis Offset
Fields.Description: Offset applied along the Z-axis to shift the trigger volume position.

Fields.Name: Shape Type
Fields.Description: Defines the geometric shape used for the interaction trigger area (e.g., box, sphere).

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly Direction Type
Fields.Description: Determines how the trigger area is oriented based on a reference dummy poly or direction rule.

Fields.Name: Allowed Angle
Fields.Description: Maximum angle tolerance for triggering the key guide based on player orientation.

Fields.Name: Follow Target
Fields.Description: If enabled, the key guide trigger area follows the associated dummy poly or target object.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for the reference dummy polygon used for positioning and orientation.

Fields.Name: Allow During Actions
Fields.Description: Determines whether the key guide can be displayed while the player is performing actions.

Fields.Name: Position Angle Tolerance
Fields.Description: Allowed angular deviation for the player's position relative to the trigger before the key guide activates.
